subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! A detailed letter was previously dispatched to thee, and now a brief one is being penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از پیش نامه مفصل بشما ارسال گردید حال نیز مختصر مرقوم میشود
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @call to action, @non-participation in politics, @martyrs and martyrdom, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
